phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Arco de Almedina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW AH-ruh-koo DIH ahl-mih-DEE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Arco de Almedina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH ahl-mih-DEE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Almedina Arch.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Almedina Arch.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH ahl-mih-DEE-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Arco de Almedina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the old Fado House is
phrases.text_local: Sabe onde fica a antiga casa de fado?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bih OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ahnng-TEE-guh KAH-zuh DIH FAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional fado venues often occupy historic buildings near university landmarks.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Antiga Casa de Fado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ahnng-TEE-guh KAH-zuh DIH FAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Old Fado House.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Old Fado House.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ahnng-TEE-guh KAH-zuh DIH FAH-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Antiga Casa de Fado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Almedina Arch is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o Arco de Almedina por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH ahl-mih-DEE-nuh POOR uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: The arch is a historic medieval gate connecting the lower and upper city.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Arco de Almedina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH ahl-mih-DEE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Almedina Arch.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Almedina Arch.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH ahl-mih-DEE-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Arco de Almedina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Coimbra ceramics
phrases.text_local: Onde se vendem as cerâmicas típicas de Coimbra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH VAYNG-dayng UHSH seh-RAHN-mee-kuhsh TEE-pee-kuhsh DIH KOOEEMB-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Coimbra ceramics feature distinctive blue and white rooster motifs and academic symbols.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao lojista na Cerâmica de Coimbra.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH KOOEEMB-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the shop owner at Cerâmica de Coimbra.

responses.english: Ask the shop owner at Cerâmica de Coimbra.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH KOOEEMB-ruh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao lojista na Cerâmica de Coimbra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the former Fado House is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Antiga Casa de Fado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ahnng-TEE-guh KAH-zuh DIH FAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Fado houses in Coimbra are historic venues tied to the university tradition.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Antiga Casa de Fado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ahnng-TEE-guh KAH-zuh DIH FAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the former Fado House.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the former Fado House.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ahnng-TEE-guh KAH-zuh DIH FAH-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Antiga Casa de Fado.
